title: BTSC Food Analyst Vacancy Online Form 2026

content.text: BTSC Food Analyst Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about BTSC Food Analyst Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Bihar Technical Service Commission (BTSC) Food Analyst Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 24/2026 Short Details
Notification Out : 20/05/2026 Starting Date : 20/05/2026 Last Date : 19/06/2026 11:59 PM
For All Candidates : 100/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 21-37 Years Age Limit as on : 01/08/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Medical Examination Document Verification

Food Analyst : Degree in Chemistry, Microbiology, Dairy Chemistry, Agriculture Science, Veterinary Science, Fisheries Science, Bio-technology, Food Safety, Food Technology, Food and Nutrition, Dairy Technology, Oil Technology, or Veterinary Science; or any other equivalent qualification approved by the Central Government and prescribed by the competent authority, with a minimum of three years’ experience in food analysis. Additionally, candidates must have passed the Food Analyst examination conducted by the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI), New Delhi.

items: The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.

Additionally, candidates must have passed the Food Analyst examination conducted by the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI), New Delhi.
